titleStmt.title: SII 17.557: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 557. (A.R. No. 514 of 1904.) KŌḌIYAKKĀḌU, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Amṛitaghaṭēśvara temple.
The details of date given, viz., 32nd year, Makara ba. Thursday, Rēvati corresponds to 1276 A.D. January 23.

This inscription records that in exchange for the land formerly granted for the maintenance of the garden called Tiruvāypāḍi (cf. No. 556 above) which was given over to Sēnāpatigaḷ, another plot of land called maiyārtaḍaṅgaṇṇi-mayakkal was granted by Nambikuḍiyaṉ alias Gaṅgaināṭṭukkōṉ for his own merit.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājentiracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 2vatu makaranāyaṟṟu Apa rapakṣattu viyāḻakkiḻamai peṟṟa revati nāḷ Umpaḷa nāṭṭuk kuṉṟur nāṭṭu Uṭai yār tirukkoṭikkuḻakar
koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷom Iṉṉāyaṉār koyil muppatu vaṭṭattuk kāṇiyuṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom Upaiyattiṭṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāyaṉār teva tāṉam Uḷḷur tiru
nāmattukkāṇiyil muṉṉāḷ Irupatteḻāvatu nāḷil Ivūrilirukkum nampi kuṭiyaṉāṉa kaṅkai nāṭṭuk koṉ taṉakku taṉmamāka paṇṭa vāypāṭiyāṉa tirunantavaṉat tukku tiruttoṇṭu ceyki
ṟa tirumeṉikaḷukku jivaṉattukku Uṭalāka Ūrukku vaṭakku peṇpiḷḷai koyilukku kiḻakku Ivaṉ kācu Oṭukkikkoṇṭu kalveṭṭiṉa � ṉilam veliyum ceṉāpati kaḷukku viṭṭu Iṉṉilat
tukku vilaimāṟāka tāṉattār parivattaṉai paṇṇikkuṭutta Ūrukku teṟku melaippoya veḷi yil mayyārtaṭaṅkaṇṇi mayakka leṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai nampimār civit
ttukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai paṭṭakaḷ tiruviḷakkuppuṟattukku vaṭakkum mel pāṟkellai Oḻukkaikku kiḻakkum maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyili nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷ naṭu
vupaṭṭa nilam 1 li Iṉṉilam velikkum varicai śrīpaṇṭārattukku Eṭuttaḷakkum nellukkuc cilavāka Eṅkaḷ kāṇi yeṟṟi Aḷakkum Iṭucoṟu Aricikkum nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aḷakkum Arici tūṇi pa
takku kūlikku Aṟunāḻiyāka vanta nellu Upayamākap paṇṭu ni ḷakkum Aricikku I viḻukkāṭṭil [kayi�] mattaṟu ṭaiya
Digital edition of SII 17.557 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
